response.justification: Candidate is massively overqualified for a junior/mid-level role with 15+ years of experience as a Senior/Staff engineer across many stacks, including TypeScript, React, and Node.js. While the technical fit on required skills is strong, the seniority mismatch creates real risks around salary expectations, role satisfaction, and retention. PostgreSQL experience is light (mostly MongoDB), and no Nest.js is mentioned. Worth a screening call to assess motivation for taking an entry-level position and on-site availability in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React experience across multiple production platforms
Berlin-based with fullstack breadth from database to UI, plus AWS and Kubernetes exposure
Demonstrates clean architecture mindset via TDD, craftsmanship, and open-source work
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior background vs. entry-level posting suggests salary and retention risk
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js listed; database experience is primarily MongoDB
Unclear motivation for accepting a junior role; likely flight risk once a senior opportunity appears
